title: Packaging Corporation of America's Chief Executive Officer to Speak at Bank of America Securities' Conference
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America's (NYSE: PKG) Chief Executive Officer, Mark Kowlzan, will speak at Bank of America Securities' Global Agriculture and Materials Conference at The Conrad Fort Lauderdale Beach in Fort Lauderdale, FL on Thursday, March 3, 2022. After Mr. Kowlzan's formal presentation, he and Executive Vice President and CFO, Robert Mundy, will participate in a Fireside Chat Q&A session.
